summary_one_line: Font must carry an AAT morx substitution table (sfnt with 'morx' tag), gated by an exact 4-byte FOURCC comparison hb_aat_layout_has_substitution checks.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed sfnt/TrueType container whose table directory advertises the AAT 'morx' table tag (the literal FOURCC bytes 0x6d 0x6f 0x72 0x78 = 'morx'), so hb_aat_layout_has_substitution(face) returns true and the true side of the && at line 59 is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seed 1 (vpc) contains the 'OTTO' sfnt magic at offset 0 and the literal ASCII 'morx' table tag at offsets 0x0c-0x0f; winner seed 2 (vpc) contains 'GPOS' plus 'mort'/'morx'-adjacent tag bytes, supplying the exact table-tag literal the AAT-table presence check matches.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile loser seeds carry no 'morx'/'OTTO' table-tag bytes at the discriminating offsets (offsets 0x00-0x0f are filled with 0xe0/0xff/0x20/0x3d runs and language-tag text like 'y-hant-hk', not FOURCC table tags), so hb_aat_layout_has_substitution(face) stays false and the true branch is never reached across all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which captures the exact 4-byte table-tag comparison operand from the CmpLog buffer and substitutes the literal 'morx' FOURCC directly into the input; plain value_profile only has the CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient and havoc, which cannot synthesize the exact 4-byte tag, so it never resolves the table-presence gate.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of a hb_aat_layout_has_substitution(face) check, i.e. a test for AAT substitution-table presence.
evidence_trail.cited_locator: L6 source line / L7 blocked side

evidence_trail.claim: The globally blocked side is the true branch.
The winning vpc seed contains the literal ASCII 'morx' table tag and the 'OTTO' sfnt magic.
A second winning vpc seed carries OpenType table tags ('GPOS', 'mort').
The loser value_profile seeds lack table-tag FOURCC bytes at the discriminating offsets, carrying language-tag text and byte runs instead.
At the discriminating offsets 0x0c-0x0f, the winner bytes spell the table tag while the loser bytes are unrelated control/run bytes.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and uses only havoc plus token mutators.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the havoc and token stack.
value_profile_cmplog wins this branch (resolved 8/10) while value_profile loses (resolved 0/10).

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5691 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed ae73a8c9233c3cb8` and observed 1 I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -) at depth 18 of the 19-level ancestor chain — the dash-row floor signal that, under the current build, marks an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in cmplog/vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating only on an exact 4-byte 'morx' tag comparison where value_profile resolves the true branch as fast as value_profile_cmplog — showing the CMP_MAP gradient alone, without I2SRandReplace substitution, suffices to synthesize the exact FOURCC.

weakest_evidence_point: The blocker line shows hb_aat_layout_has_substitution but the prompt does not include that function's body, so the inference that it does an exact 4-byte 'morx' FOURCC comparison (vs a coarser table-scan) rests on the seed-byte tag evidence rather than the compared source.
